arts.ttl: Man United star is branded 'CRIMINAL' by Paul Scholes as Rasmus Hojlund loses his cool at team-mate during Real Sociedad Europa League clash
arts.sum: United were looking to push their bid to qualify for next season's Champions League as the Europa League knockout stages started on Thursday as they took on the LaLiga side in the first leg.

arts.ttl: WATCH: Real Sociedad fall behind to Manchester United as Joshua Zirkzee opens scoring
arts.sum: Real Sociedad’s hopes of reaching the Europa League quarter-finals have suffered a blow as Manchester United have taken the lead in the first leg of their round of 16 tie at the Reale Arena. The first 45 minutes was devoid of much action, but it was Man United that came the closest when Bruno Fernandes […] The post WATCH: Real Sociedad fall behind to Manchester United as Joshua Zirkzee opens scoring appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye BARGAIN transfer for prolific Premier League star
arts.sum: Manchester United could turn to a Premier League hot-shot in their pursuit of a new striker this summer as Ruben Amorim looks to restructure his squad under tight constraints. There is an acceptance at Old Trafford that they will not be able to recoup the majority of the €74 million spent on Hojlund in 2023 but his departure would allow for a strong pursuit of Mateta or any other forward.

arts.ttl: Report: Kobbie Mainoo makes Chelsea demand, Blues told the one thing they must do to sign him
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo would only entertain a move to Chelsea if they offer him a higher salary than Cole Palmer, according to reports. The 19-year-old midfielder has less than two years left on his current Manchester United contract and is in talks over an extension. arts.ttl: Man Utd suffer huge transfer blow as Viktor Gyokeres makes preference clear
arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on signing Viktor Gyokeres this summer, but the Sporting Lisbon striker seemingly has his heart set on joining a club in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Man United star hammered for 'unacceptable' treatment of Rasmus Hojlund vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund is without a goal in 18 appearances for the club after a torrid run of form

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes names the one Manchester United player who 'has to play' under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Former Man United midfielder Paul Scholes believes Alejandro Garnacho has to be involved under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United vs. Real Sociedad in Europa League
Paul Scholes pinpoints reason for Rasmus Hojlund struggles amid 18-game goal drought - as Man United legend explains how the striker can turn his form around
arts.sum: Hojlund is currently on an 18-match goal drought and the Danish forward has been taken off in recent Manchester United matches to be replaced by 17-year-old striker Chido Obi.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man United discover asking price in Bayern Munich transfer battle for Bundesliga star?
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United reportedly learn how much it will take to sign Stuttgart midfielder Angelo Stiller, who is also attracting interest from Bayern Munich.
